title: Analyst, Pricing & Revenue Optimization (m/f/x)
required_skills: ~5 years experience in commercial analytics, pricing, or related analytical roles
SQL and major programming language proficiency
Translate complex analyses into actionable business recommendations
Strategic mindset with business acumen and commercial awareness
Experience with pricing algorithms, dynamic pricing, or revenue management systems
bonus_skills: Data visualization tools (Tableau, Looker, Power BI, DBT)
Experience in sustainability-focused or circular economy businesses
Understanding of marketplace or two-sided platform dynamics
matched_skills: Stakeholder management and communication (demonstrated across HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Translating complex data into actionable recommendations (KPI reporting, C-level reporting)
Strategic mindset and business acumen (GTM strategy, commercial decision-making)
Data visualization — Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300), Google Looker Studio
Marketplace sector exposure (ECE Group — Marketplace / Real Estate)
Sustainability project experience (VfB Stuttgart impact measurement framework)
missing_skills: Python or other major programming language
Pricing algorithm development or dynamic pricing systems
A/B test design and experimentation methodology
E-commerce or marketplace analytics (hands-on analytical role)
core_responsibilities: Develop and optimize end-to-end pricing strategies including algorithm development, implementation, and performance monitoring
Design and execute pricing experiments and A/B tests with strategic recommendations to leadership
Generate commercial insights via deep-dive analyses on pricing elasticity, customer behavior, market dynamics, and competitive positioning
Collaborate with senior stakeholders in Commercial to identify opportunities and solve business challenges
Create and automate reporting frameworks and dashboards for self-service analytics across the organization
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI certification and Looker Studio as direct match for the data visualization requirement
Emphasize any data analysis work: KPI dashboards, financial variance reports, ROI analysis at Moli Media
Reframe competitive intelligence and market monitoring experience at Intelligent Power Corporation as pricing-adjacent analytical work
Stress stakeholder management and C-level communication across HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd to address the senior collaboration requirement
Leverage ECE Group marketplace experience to demonstrate understanding of platform/marketplace dynamics
Highlight sustainability alignment: VfB Stuttgart impact measurement and interest in circular economy
Acknowledge the SQL/programming gap honestly — consider adding a note about willingness to learn or any self-study
